task_name: Add Builder Task Candidate Review Suite Coverage
goal: Add Builder Task Contract Candidate checks to the shared Bluepilot review suite and document the new local review coverage.
claims: BP-050 adds Builder Task Candidate checks to the shared Bluepilot review suite.
BP-050 adds output invariant coverage that keeps builder_task_create_allowed and builder_execute_allowed false.
BP-050 does not change Builder Task Candidate runtime behavior or fixtures.
assumptions: BP-049 already introduced the local Builder Task Candidate mock and golden fixtures.
Review suite coverage should remain the shared entry point for local reviewers.
Invariant tests are needed before expanding toward any real Builder adapter handoff.
dod: tools/test-bluepilot-review-suite.cjs runs Builder Task Candidate syntax, fixtures, and invariant checks.
docs/BLUEPILOT_REVIEW_SUITE_v0.md mentions Builder Task Candidate coverage and limits.
stop_conditions: Builder Task Candidate runtime or fixture changes become necessary
Live Builder, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, task create, execute, approve, or push becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-049 added a local Builder Task Candidate mock but did not yet wire it into the shared Bluepilot Review Suite.
